indicators.indicator: Same invoice number from same vendor
indicators.detection: Exact match on vendor ID + invoice number

indicators.indicator: Same amount and date, different invoice number
indicators.detection: Match on vendor + amount + date within 3 days

indicators.indicator: Sequential invoice numbers with identical amounts
indicators.detection: Sequential numbers, same amount, same vendor
Identical unusual amounts from multiple vendors in same period
Cross-reference vendor addresses against HR records
Bank account change within 30 days of large payment
No physical address on file for non-individual vendors

indicators.indicator: Vendor created and paid within 48 hours
indicators.detection: New vendor setup to first payment time analysis

indicators.indicator: Round number invoices with no cents
indicators.detection: Invoices ending in .00 above threshold frequency
Invoices consistently at 95-99% of approval limit
First-digit distribution analysis vs. expected Benford curve
Month-over-month spend increase exceeding 50% without PO change

indicators.indicator: Multiple invoices summing to a larger PO
indicators.detection: Multiple invoices from same vendor in same period summing to round number
Same work split to stay under different approver thresholds
Early milestones disproportionately large vs. work completed
Cannot confirm vendor via state business registry or D and B
Vague company name with broad service description

indicators.indicator: Single point of contact, no web presence
indicators.detection: No website, no LinkedIn, single contact phone or email
Invoice layout, fonts, or formatting similar to internal documents
